elements.title: Palermo Quran
elements.contents: ... that the Palermo Quran (detail pictured) has been described as "the single most important artifact so far known to survive from Muslim Sicily"?

elements.title: Tao Siliang
elements.contents: ... that Tao Siliang led efforts to promote iodized salt in China?

elements.title: a statue of Booker T. Washington
elements.contents: ... that nearly 100,000 donors contributed towards the creation of a statue of Booker T. Washington?

elements.title: Sulyoadikusumo
elements.contents: ... that, when he visited Surabaya, Indonesian defense minister Sulyoadikusumo was arrested by a local military commander who proceeded to claim his title?

elements.title: Eagle Creek Park
elements.contents: ... that an old gravel pit in Eagle Creek Park in Indiana is now part of an Important Bird Area?

elements.title: Mark Cooney
elements.contents: ... that in college Mark Cooney was a defensive end, center, and defensive tackle, but upon joining the NFL he was told to try a position that he had never played before?

elements.title: Maipure language
elements.contents: ... that the extinct Maipure language had a separate category of nouns for things that cannot be possessed, such as astronomical objects?

elements.title: Else Went
elements.contents: ... that a university class inspired Else Went to write a five-hour-long play based on Dungeons & Dragons?

elements.title: Metland Egg
elements.contents: ... that nobody knows where the Metland Egg is?
